autonomousOrchestration: Cursor executes roadmap/priorities/deps; owner controls via /operations/priorities and observes execution/reviews/deployment — no manual ChatGPT relay.
ownerDirective: PRIMARY: Driver Intelligence Core (real profit, rental, GPS history, OCR queue). P1 APK poll parallel — не freeze на EAS.
editPolicy: Owner edits via /operations/priorities (authenticated) → JSON + feed audit; Cursor re-reads each cycle.
nextImplementationTarget: Route timeline intelligence UI; field validation of backfill + zone insights on device
executionNotes: Analytics backfill from GPS+shift history (24h cooldown). Route efficiency median on dashboard. Repo safety gates active. Heatmaps blocked.

cursorAdaptationRules: Execute critical + high before medium/low unless blocked by dependencyGraph
blocked level or status=blocked → document in feed, pick next actionable node
experimental → no fully_done without validation evidence
User ownerDirective overrides default queue when explicit conflict
